text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Fan Fest is here, and the central
plaza is bustling with people.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, well. Someone's having a good time.
choice_data_list: Why aren't you in your uniform?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe. My street clothes suit me, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I was actually planning to enter one of the sports
events, seeing as it's spring and all...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But one of my friends on the events committee
begged me to join the Miss Tracen competition.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Snagging the number one spot isn't easy, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Not only are they making me give a speech about
racing, they're also checking my fashion sense!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm always up for a challenge. This contest
suits me to a T!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
No way! You're going for Miss Tracen too,
Scarlet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Curren?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Awww... Well there go my chances.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, little old me, up against Scarlet? So not
happening.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I never stood a chance from the start.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
When they said to come in our "usual clothes," I
thought they meant our school uniform!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I'm such a dum-dum. No matter how much I try for the Grand Prix, I'll never get there... Sniff.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sniff... You're so kind.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks. Now my heart's full of warm fuzzies!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So... Umm...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I know this is kinda sudden, but can I ask you for
a teensy little favor?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Can you vote for me for Miss Tracen? I feel like I
could really give my all if I knew you were
cheering for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She pleads with me with eyes full of tears. Those
eyes... I've got to help her. I've got to!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! See ya round! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What are you blushing over, idiot?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yes. You. Are!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Really! Whose trainer do you think you are?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You're supposed to help me become number one! In everything! Including the Miss Tracen contest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet seems strangely worked up as she
enters the Miss Tracen Academy contest.
Eventually, the time comes to announce the
results.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
The shining star of this year's Grand Prix is...
Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You have got to be kidding.
choice_data_list: You were number one in my heart.
You were number one in my heart.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's nice of you to say and all, but... Ugh! I
can't believe I only got second place...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I just don't get how I lost...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet's defeat leaves her feeling down for
a while.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
The shining star of this year's Grand Prix is...
Daiwa Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪ Thank you for your support, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'll make sure to shine even brighter for all of you!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe! See? I can break out the charm when I try!
choice_data_list: That's the number one for you!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Haha! ♪ Exactly! I'm the top Umamusume in the
academy!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Why would you look at anyone else when you've
got me right here?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Really now? I wonder.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm wiped. I need to recharge with
something sweet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Buy me some cake.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yes, you. That's not a problem, is it?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
When Tracen Academy's top Umamusume asks
you to do something, you should be grateful!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I treat Daiwa Scarlet to some celebratory cake.
